name: Talk to your Google Sheets data using AI
description: Reads data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet, uses Claude AI to analyze and answer questions about the data, and posts the response to Slack using Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Talk to your Google Sheets using ChatGPT-5

spreadsheetId.description: The ID of the Google Sheets spreadsheet to analyze

question.description: Question to ask about the spreadsheet data

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the answer

steps.name: Format spreadsheet data for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for data analysis
